name: Sitecore (Unicorn, XM Cloud/JSS, Config, Helix)
description: First-party Sitecore parsers and post-processors: Unicorn (.yml: items, presentation, template inheritance), XM Cloud (JSS), config patches (.config: pipelines/DI/events), Helix architecture (Feature/Foundation/Project), plus CLR-type, field-type, datasource and serialization-coverage resolvers.
